title: centaurea pusilla
intro: Centaurea pusilla, also known as the lesser knapweed or small knapweed, is a flowering plant species in the family Asteraceae. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits associated with Centaurea pusilla include its ability to relieve digestive issues, reduce fever, and soothe skin irritations. Centaurea pusilla is commonly used in herbal preparations such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are often used to treat a variety of health conditions.
